goal: Predict bulk_modulus, density, tg for PSTR (*CC(c1ccccc1)*)
assumptions: PSTR is confidence=medium: class-specific temperatures exist in polymer_rules.json, so group-contribution Tg estimation is skipped
Member resolved to PS (polystyrene): atactic, exp Tg=373 K, exp RT density=1.05 g/cm3, exp K_T=3.3-4.0 GPa

uncertainties.name: pcff_ps_tg_transferability
uncertainties.note: No direct PCFF PS Tg validation paper exists. PCFF Class II is validated on PC (Tg 417 vs 422 K, Tang2022) and PMMA vinyl backbone (<10%, NkepsuMbitou2025); PS aromatic-pendant vinyl is an analogy. SimPoly reports PS MD Tg 399+/-22 K vs exp 373 K.

uncertainties.name: k_subentanglement_dp
uncertainties.note: DP=40 < DP@Me=160 (aPS Me=16,600 g/mol). Bulk modulus is screening-grade; sub-entanglement DP underestimates K vs converged value while MD strain-rate overestimates. Reported alongside exp reference, not used to revise plan.

uncertainties.name: hardware_optimum
uncertainties.note: directional_probe recommends kokkos gpu1_mpi1 (42.8 ns/day) but measured_on A800/32-core (host mismatch vs RTX6000/18-core) and values_are_benchmarked=false; ~6.4k cell is ~2.1x the 3020-atom probe cell. Kept by_forcefield default.

evidence.claim: PCFF via EMC (Class II). Switched from TraPPE-UA 2026-06-11: UA representation ignores phenyl ring partial charges and pi-dihedral barriers that govern PS Tg (~373 K); no TraPPE-UA PS Tg validation exists in literature. PCFF Class II explicitly parameterizes aromatic C-H charges and cross-terms; validated for PC (Tang2022, PCFF Tg=417K vs exp 422K) and PMMA vinyl backbone (NkepsuMbitou2025, Class II within 10%). Soldera2006 (COMPASS/OPLS) confirms MD can reach PS Tg ~449-484 K raw, WLF-corrected ~373 K. No direct PCFF PS Tg paper found; confidence=medium until confirmed.

alternatives.reason: UA representation omits phenyl ring partial charges and pi-dihedral barriers that govern PS Tg; no TraPPE-UA PS Tg validation exists. Switched to PCFF 2026-06-11.

evidence.claim: PCFF Class II uses bond-increment charges (FF-embedded), consistent with the PCFF aromatic C-H parameterization. Charge method must be consistent with chosen FF.
RESP charges (HF/6-31G*) recommended for PS/PSTR due to phenyl pi-system polarization; AM1-BCC acceptable fallback. bond-increment is the EMC/PCFF default and adequate for screening-grade Tg/density.

alternatives.reason: more accurate ring pi polarization; not required for screening-grade

evidence.claim: PCFF assigns aromatic C-H partial charges to the phenyl ring (|q|>0.1e on ring atoms), so long-range Coulomb (PPPM) is required; lj/cut is acceptable only for purely apolar PHYC/PDIE. Neglecting long-range Coulomb biases density/Tg.

alternatives.reason: valid only for pure C/H apolar backbones; PCFF ring charges make it incorrect for PS

evidence.claim: DP=40 > Fox-Flory plateau (DP>=20) and > atactic-tacticity averaging floor (DP>=30, Soldera2006) -> Tg is chain-length converged. styrene C8H8 = 16 all-atom; DP40 x nchain10 x 16 = ~6,400 atoms.
PS member exp anchors: Tg=373 K, RT density=1.05 g/cm3, K_T=3.3-4.0 GPa (Mark2007 Table 7.6 Tait params, Zoller1978).
For bulk_modulus, DP=40 < DP@Me=160 (aPS Me=16,600 g/mol) -> K is screening-grade; converged K needs DP>=160 in a dedicated property run.

alternatives.reason: entanglement-converged K, but ~4x atoms; outside 48h screening budget

decisions.choice: multirate sweep 200-600 K, 20 K bins, rates [40,160,400] K/ns; bracket exp Tg=373 K

evidence.claim: Sweep 200-600 K at 20 K steps = 21 bins, brackets exp Tg=373 K with wide margin and covers raw MD Tg ~430-500 K (SimPoly 399+/-22 K). Multirate WLF/log-linear extrapolation corrects cooling-rate artifact toward DSC-equivalent rate. Bilinear fit R^2 verified before reporting.

decisions.choice: Murnaghan NPT compression at 300 K (glassy), pressures [-1000,-500,0,500,1000] atm

evidence.claim: PS is glassy at 300 K (Tg~373 K > 300 K). Glassy bulk modulus via Murnaghan NPT compression (Wu 2019 Comput. Mater. Sci. validated; symmetric, cell-size independent). Born+NVT REMOVED pipeline-wide 2026-06-21 (PCFF+PPPM virial incompatibility, K_Born 8-15x too high, failed 3/3 runs). Deform 3-direction uniaxial is the fallback if Murnaghan fit fails or B0_prime outside [4,20].

PCFF = class2 + PPPM; by_forcefield[pcff] default is kokkos full-offload (pair+class2 bonded+pppm+neigh on GPU), mpi=1, 1 GPU/run (run-0 parity 0.000% on energies+forces+pressure, 2026-06-20). Cell ~6,400 atoms < 10k -> 1 GPU (GPU-saturated by one PPPM job; >1 run/GPU degrades). directional_probe recommends kokkos gpu1_mpi1 at 42.826 ns/day but measured_on 4x A800/32-core (host mismatch vs RTX6000/18-core), values_are_benchmarked=false, and ~6.4k cell is ~2.1x the 3020-atom probe cell -> treat as hint only. Kept by_forcefield default; choice == default.

findings: Gate verified independently: PSTR confidence=medium -> reasoned (matches plan_mode).
D-01..D-07 policy coverage, evidence (DOIs/citations on FF/electrostatics/property_method), require clauses, and alternatives all satisfied.

D-08_hardware: pin {kokkos, gpu1, mpi1} == by_forcefield[pcff] default; mpi=1 is canonical for PCFF KOKKOS full-offload (kspace on GPU). Host mismatch + values_are_benchmarked=false correctly handled: recommended_by_ff treated as hint, default kept, confidence:low, hardware_benchmark probe planned.
All planned_stages have required fields + valid tracks; stages match properties {density,tg,bulk_modulus}; dominant uncertainty named with valid reduction_probe.
